top_signals.title: Investors brace for a 'long grind' as Iran war escalation dims hopes of a early end
top_signals.summary: As U.S. and Iranian forces continue exchanging strikes, investors are increasingly grappling with the possibility that the conflict could become more prolonged.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Asia’s Currency Fight Moves Offshore as Central Banks Push Back
top_signals.summary: Asian central banks are increasingly facing currency pressures originating outside their borders.

top_signals.title: Central Asia Metals’ copper-zinc production outpaces last year
top_signals.summary: The UK-listed miner also reported significantly higher realized prices for the metals through the five-month period.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: MP Materials COO increases shareholding
top_signals.summary: COO Michael Rosenthal bought 10,000 shares at $54.30 per share.
